name: sdlc-workflow
description: Complete SDLC workflow with integrated code review, design quality, Diátaxis documentation, analysis, observability, and git lifecycle. 27 lifecycle commands (10 stages + 5 wf-design commands + wf-next + wf-status + wf-resume + wf-sync + wf-announce + wf-amend + wf-extend + wf-ideate + wf-how + wf-quick + wf-rca) with branch-aware git operations, wf-validate pre-write hook, 31 review commands, 7 aggregate reviews, 25 skills (14 design + 4 analysis + 7 Diátaxis), and setup-wide-logging command. wf-how routes across five modes: quick code answers, codebase exploration (parallel Explore agents + synthesis), deep web research (6–8 agents, 200+ sources), workflow artifact explanation, and findings explanation — with optional Diátaxis output. wf-plan includes reuse scan: Explore sub-agent 1 searches the wider codebase for existing utilities and capabilities before planning new implementations. v8.12–8.13: wf-shape and wf-plan web search sub-agents fire by default (opt-out not opt-in) and cover implementation best practices, anti-patterns, gotchas, and performance pitfalls. v8.14: four standalone workflow entry points — wf-hotfix (6-stage incident-response, scope-locked), wf-update-deps (scan+research+tier-prioritized dependency updates), wf-docs (Diátaxis-aware documentation audit and generation), wf-refactor (behavior-preserving refactoring with test baseline and incremental green steps). v8.17: wf-quick — compressed planning workflow that collapses intake, shape, design, slice, and plan into a single artifact for small intentional changes; routes to /wf-implement for the standard execute-verify-review-handoff-ship lifecycle, with warn-and-continue tripwires that flag scope breaches without blocking. v8.18: wf-rca — read-only root-cause analysis workflow with three parallel diagnosis sub-agents (code path, recent change correlation, blast radius); writes a structured RCA artifact with confidence and fix-shape direction, synthesizes a minimal 02-shape.md so /wf-plan can consume the workflow directory without modification, and recommends the right downstream command (/wf-plan, /wf-quick, /wf-hotfix, or human-triage).
